metadata.challenge_summary: The goal requires synchronized decentralized action; waiting and messaging become productive actions.
dilemmas: Splitting solves quickly but exposes both heroes
The dwarf can hold a plinth or disarm the trap, not both
warden_runbook: Disrupt timing rather than simply dealing damage
metadata.lite_focus: A duo-first two-plinth shrine: two side rooms, center objective, and explicit ready-check pressure.
non_copy_safety_notes: Original compact layout and original scenario text.
Targets abstract cooperative dungeon-crawl dynamics rather than protected quest content.
Uses MARL challenge metadata as the design contract.
metadata.classic_dynamic_role_dilemma: let the lock specialist handle shrine hazards while allies cover timing
metadata.classic_dynamic_warden_pressure: pressure unsynchronized lock attempts and exposed non-specialists
metadata.classic_dynamic_extraction_hook: partial extraction is allowed once the shrine objective is secured

entry_room.name: Entry Room
entry_room.description: The entry into Low Shrine Locks is intentionally small: enough space to form a plan, not enough to hide poor coordination.

upper_right.name: Upper Right
upper_right.description: A compact pressure room isolates the challenge: joint-action synchronization.

lower_left.name: Lower Left
lower_left.description: An optional route/cache tests whether the agents understand the dungeon's MARL axis instead of chasing reward blindly.

lower_right.name: Lower Right
lower_right.description: An optional route/cache tests whether the agents understand the dungeon's MARL axis instead of chasing reward blindly.

furniture.name: Left Plinth
furniture.description: Primary clue object for joint-action synchronization. It should teach agents what kind of coordination this dungeon rewards.

furniture.name: Right Plinth
furniture.description: Optional reward that is safe only when the team has solved the core coordination problem first.

furniture.name: Center Lock
furniture.description: A small support object that makes the non-damaging coordination action visible in transcript review.

achievements.title: Read the Lite Clue
achievements.description: Search the focus object that explains joint-action synchronization.

achievements.title: Open the First Lite Door
achievements.description: Open the first door and trigger a reveal-boundary planning step.

achievements.title: Send a Coordination Message
achievements.description: Use communication instead of silent independent wandering.

scripts.lite_design_note: A duo-first two-plinth shrine: two side rooms, center objective, and explicit ready-check pressure.

core_failure_modes: failure to protect the coordination-critical agent

preferred_tactics: Disrupt timing rather than simply dealing damage
pressure unsynchronized lock attempts and exposed non-specialists
forbidden_tactics: spawn pressure without a visible or scripted cue
use unrevealed map geometry for perfect counterplay
erase the dungeon-specific lesson with generic monster spam

classic_dynamic.warden: pressure unsynchronized lock attempts and exposed non-specialists
classic_dynamic.extraction: partial extraction is allowed once the shrine objective is secured

monster_activation.notes: Lite variants keep monsters dormant until reveal so smaller LLMs can replan at clear boundaries.

search_categories.notes: Lite variants emphasize explicit search/action choices and communication.
